items.title: The .ART Award Honors the Story Behind the Artwork

items.title: Charleston’s African American Museum Furloughs All Staff
items.summary: The institution cited “a shift in the political and funding environment” and said staggered furloughs would help avoid layoffs.

items.title: A Better World at the Obama Center
items.summary: The new campus is an expression of the former US president's civic ideals, and a reminder of how distant they now seem.
